ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the country is located */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is situated */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "happiness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness score record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the happiness score data */,
  "happiness_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the happiness score among countries */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score for the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the GDP per capita */,
  "social_support_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the social support */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the healthy life expectancy */,
  "freedom_to_make_life_choices_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the freedom to make life choices */,
  "generosity_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the generosity */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the perceptions of corruption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("happiness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_factors" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic factor record */,
  "happiness_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the happiness score record */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita for the country */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_factors_happiness_id FOREIGN KEY ("happiness_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("happiness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social support record */,
  "happiness_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the happiness score record */,
  "family_support" REAL /* Score of social support (family support) for the country */,
  "social_connections" REAL /* Score of social connections for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_support_happiness_id FOREIGN KEY ("happiness_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("happiness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "happiness_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the happiness score record */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy score for the country */,
  "obesity_rate" REAL /* Obesity rate for the country */,
  "mental_health_index" REAL /* Mental health index for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_happiness_id FOREIGN KEY ("happiness_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("happiness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trust_metrics" (
  "trust_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trust metric record */,
  "happiness_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the happiness score record */,
  "government_corruption" REAL /* Government corruption score affecting trust */,
  "public_trust_in_police" REAL /* Public trust in police score */,
  "public_trust_in_judiciary" REAL /* Public trust in judiciary score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trust_metrics_happiness_id FOREIGN KEY ("happiness_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("happiness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generosity_metrics" (
  "generosity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generosity record */,
  "happiness_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the happiness score record */,
  "charity_donations" REAL /* Charity donations score for the country */,
  "volunteering_rate" REAL /* Volunteering rate score for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generosity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_metrics_happiness_id FOREIGN KEY ("happiness_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("happiness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dystopia_residuals" (
  "dystopia_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dystopia residual record */,
  "happiness_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the happiness score record */,
  "dystopia_residual" REAL /* Dystopia residual score for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dystopia_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dystopia_residuals_happiness_id FOREIGN KEY ("happiness_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("happiness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness status record */,
  "happiness_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the happiness score record */,
  "happiness_status" TEXT /* Categorical status of happiness (e.g., Happy country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_status_happiness_id FOREIGN KEY ("happiness_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("happiness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, policymaker) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level for the user (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
